name: I Will Make Whitebeard the King of the Pirates

issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (correct) but condition type 'HasCardOnBoard' is wrong—should check Leader type, not board state. Use LeaderHasType condition instead.
Condition 'HasCardOnBoard' with name 'Whitebeard Pirates' is invalid. Should use LeaderHasType:'Whitebeard Pirates' to check if Leader's type includes Whitebeard Pirates.
Action type 'RevealFromHand' is wrong. Should be 'RevealFromDeck' (reveal from top of deck, not hand). Card is revealed from deck, then optionally played.
Missing 'PlayFromDeck' or equivalent action. After revealing, the card should be playable (conditional play action required). Current structure only gives Rush; does not play the card.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'DrawCard' is orphaned and unexplained. This should not exist—original effect text contains no draw action. Remove entirely.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] If your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card is a Character card with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" and a cost of 9 or less, you may play that card. If you do, that Character gains [Rush] during this turn.
